title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, airflow. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: InsightFlow is hiring a junior data analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V030: Data Analyst at InsightFlow. Location: Dnipro. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.1 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, airflow, looker. Optional skills: ga4, data storytelling, dbt. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
